synopsis.summary: Are you a classic comfort seeker or a bold trendsetter in the kitchen? Your daily habits and flavor preferences say more about your personality than you think. Take this quiz to find out which fast food giant truly represents your soul.

characters.name: McDonald's
characters.short_description: You are the ultimate global icon of consistency, reliability, and mass appeal.
characters.profile_text: You are the gold standard of predictability and efficiency, a person who values systems and knows exactly how to deliver results that everyone can agree on. People look to you when they need a steady hand or a familiar face because you have mastered the art of being everywhere at once without losing your core identity. Your strength lies in your incredible reach and your ability to scale your ideas, making you a natural leader in any mainstream environment. However, your commitment to the status quo can sometimes make you appear rigid or resistant to radical change. You might struggle when a situation calls for niche expertise or artisanal flair, as you prefer the comfort of the tried-and-true over the risks of the unknown. While you are undeniably successful, you must remember to occasionally step outside your carefully constructed routines to rediscover the spark of individual creativity that keeps life from feeling too mechanical.

characters.name: Taco Bell
characters.short_description: You are a creative rule-breaker who thrives on late-night inspiration and unconventional combinations.
characters.profile_text: You possess a vibrant, experimental spirit that refuses to be boxed in by traditional expectations. You are the type of person who can take a few basic ingredients and reinvent them in a thousand different ways, proving that innovation is often about perspective rather than resources. Your social circle appreciates your quirky sense of humor and your willingness to embrace the weird side of life, especially during those spontaneous late-night adventures where your best ideas tend to surface. Your greatest pitfall is a tendency toward chaos; because you are always chasing the next bold flavor or concept, you might overlook the importance of a solid foundation. You sometimes prioritize novelty over substance, which can lead to projects that are exciting at first but lack long-term staying power. By balancing your wild imagination with a bit more discipline, you can ensure that your unique contributions leave a lasting impact rather than just a fleeting buzz.

characters.name: Chick-fil-A
characters.short_description: You are defined by your unwavering principles, exceptional manners, and commitment to high-quality service.
characters.profile_text: You carry yourself with a level of grace and politeness that is increasingly rare in the modern world. For you, the how is just as important as the what, and you take immense pride in providing a premium experience for everyone you encounter. You are deeply rooted in your values, which provides you with a strong moral compass but also means you are very selective about where you invest your time and energy. This focus allows you to excel in your chosen niche, earning you a loyal following of people who trust your integrity implicitly. On the downside, your strict adherence to a specific set of rules can make you seem exclusive or even judgmental to those who do not share your worldview. You may find it difficult to adapt when life throws you into environments that do not align with your structured way of living. Learning to be more flexible without compromising your core beliefs will help you navigate a world that is not always as orderly as you would like it to be.

characters.name: Subway
characters.short_description: You are a health-conscious pragmatist who believes in the power of customization and personal choice.
characters.profile_text: You are the architect of your own life, preferring to hand-pick every element of your daily routine to ensure it meets your specific standards. You value transparency and like to see exactly what is going into your projects, relationships, and body, making you a very deliberate and thoughtful individual. Your fresh perspective often leads you to seek out better, more efficient ways of doing things, and you are rarely satisfied with a one-size-fits-all solution. This DIY attitude is your greatest strength, allowing you to adapt to various situations by simply swapping out a few components. However, your desire for total control can sometimes lead to decision paralysis or a lack of cohesive vision. Because you are so focused on the individual parts, you might lose sight of the big picture, resulting in a life that feels like a collection of choices rather than a unified journey. Embracing a bit more spontaneity can help you move past the assembly line of your mind and into a more organic way of being.

characters.name: Burger King
characters.short_description: You are a bold challenger who is not afraid to take risks and do things your own way.
characters.profile_text: You have a bit of a rebellious streak and a Have It Your Way attitude that sets you apart from the crowd. You are not content to just follow the leader; instead, you are constantly looking for ways to disrupt the status quo and assert your own individuality. You thrive on competition and are not afraid to use a bit of edge or humor to get your point across, making you a formidable presence in any debate or creative endeavor. Your willingness to experiment with flame-broiled ideas means you often hit on something truly unique that others are too timid to try. The risk you face is that your desire to be different can sometimes come across as contrarian for the sake of being difficult. You might spend so much energy trying to outmaneuver your rivals that you forget to focus on your own internal growth. By channeling your competitive energy into self-improvement rather than just external comparison, you can truly claim the crown you feel you deserve.

characters.name: KFC
characters.short_description: You are a soulful traditionalist who values secret recipes, heritage, and the comfort of home.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of depth and history, someone who understands that the best things in life often take time and a secret blend of experiences to perfect. You have a warm, inviting personality that makes people feel at home, and you are likely the one who keeps family traditions alive or maintains long-standing friendships. You believe in the power of a bucket list life, full of rich experiences and hearty connections that nourish the soul. Your strengths lie in your authenticity and your refusal to cut corners when it comes to the things that truly matter. However, your deep attachment to the past can sometimes make you a bit of a colonel of your own habits, resistant to modernizing or trying new things that do not fit your established heritage. You may find yourself stuck in your ways, clinging to a secret recipe for success that might need an update for the current era. Opening yourself up to new influences while keeping your core values intact will ensure your legacy remains as flavorful as ever.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you are faced with a complex task, what is your primary strategy for success?

options.text: I follow a standardized, proven system to ensure a predictable and efficient result.
I experiment with unconventional combinations and see what creative sparks fly.
I adhere strictly to my core principles and focus on providing high-quality service.
I break the task down into individual components and customize each one to my liking.
I look for ways to challenge the status quo and assert my own unique methodology.
I rely on time-tested traditions and heritage to guide my decision-making process.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically behave in a social group or team setting?

options.text: I am the reliable anchor who ensures everyone knows the plan and follows the routine.
I am the spontaneous one who brings humor and unexpected ideas to the table.
I am the polite diplomat who maintains high standards of conduct and respect.
I am the pragmatist who advocates for personal choice and individual flexibility.
I am the bold challenger who isn't afraid to spark a debate to find a better way.
I am the soulful storyteller who values deep connections and shared history.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your ideal environment for productivity and personal growth?

options.text: A highly organized space where efficiency is maximized through clear systems.
A vibrant, slightly chaotic atmosphere that thrives on late-night inspiration.
A structured environment rooted in strong values and a commitment to excellence.
A transparent setting where I can see all the moving parts and adjust them myself.
A competitive landscape where I can test my limits and stand out from the crowd.
A warm, nostalgic setting that honors the past while working toward the future.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you react when you encounter a significant change or disruption?

options.text: I try to find the most stable path back to my established routine as quickly as possible.
I embrace the chaos and use it as an opportunity to reinvent my approach.
I stay true to my internal compass and only adapt if it aligns with my values.
I analyze the new variables and pick-and-choose which ones to integrate into my life.
I view it as a challenge to be conquered and a chance to prove my resilience.
I look for the 'secret recipe' or the underlying wisdom that has helped others survive.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these personal traits do you value most in yourself?

options.text: Consistency: People always know exactly what they are going to get from me.
Innovation: I can turn the most basic ingredients into something totally new.
Integrity: I never compromise on my manners or my moral standards.
Autonomy: I have the power to build my life exactly the way I want it.
Boldness: I am not afraid to take risks and do things my own way.
Authenticity: I stay grounded in my roots and value the comfort of tradition.

topics.display_name: Which Greek Hero Is Your Ancestor?

synopsis.title: Which Legendary Greek Hero Is Actually Your Ancestor?
synopsis.summary: Ever felt a sudden surge of strength or a clever solution to a complex problem? You might have more than just mortal blood running through your veins. Take this quiz to trace your lineage back to the myths of old and discover which ancient Greek hero passed their legendary traits down to you.

characters.name: Heracles
characters.short_description: You are the descendant of the greatest champion of Olympus, defined by unmatched physical power and an indomitable will to overcome any obstacle.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a spirit that thrives under pressure and a physical presence that commands respect in any room. Like your ancestor, you are often called upon to perform the impossible, bearing burdens that would break others without a second thought. You value hard work and tangible results, often finding that your greatest growth comes from the most grueling challenges. You are the person people turn to when a situation seems hopeless, trusting in your ability to endure and provide a path forward through sheer persistence.

However, your intense drive can sometimes lead to a temper that flares when you feel cornered or misunderstood. You must learn to balance your raw strength with emotional regulation, as your impact on the world is massive and your mistakes can be equally significant. Your loyalty is your greatest asset, making you a protector of the weak and a formidable foe to those who threaten your peace. You find fulfillment in service and redemption, always seeking to prove your worth through actions rather than empty words.

characters.name: Odysseus
characters.short_description: You inherit the legacy of the master strategist, known for your sharp wit, silver tongue, and the resilience to find your way home against all odds.
characters.profile_text:
You are a thinker who prefers to outmaneuver opponents rather than face them head-on, using your intellect as your primary weapon. Your curiosity is boundless, and you have a knack for solving complex puzzles that leave others baffled. You are highly adaptable, capable of blending into new environments and speaking the language of whoever you meet to achieve your goals. This versatility makes you an excellent leader, though your tendency to overthink or manipulate situations can sometimes alienate those who value straightforwardness.

You are driven by a deep-seated desire for stability and family, even if your path to reaching them is long and winding. Your life is a series of calculated risks, and while you may wander, you are never truly lost as long as you trust your instincts. You possess a unique brand of endurance that is mental rather than physical, allowing you to survive setbacks that would crush a less clever mind. For you, the journey is a test of character, and your ultimate goal is always to return to the people and places that define your heart.

characters.name: Achilles
characters.short_description: You carry the blood of the swiftest and most brilliant warrior of the Trojan War, marked by a pursuit of excellence and a passion that burns brighter than the sun.
characters.profile_text:
You are someone who refuses to settle for mediocrity, always striving to be the best in your chosen field. Your talents are often apparent from a young age, and you possess a natural charisma that draws people to your cause. You live life with an intensity that others find both inspiring and intimidating, fueled by a desire for a legacy that will outlast your years. You are not afraid of the spotlight; in fact, you thrive when the stakes are highest and all eyes are on your performance.

This drive for greatness often comes with a sensitive nature; you feel slights deeply and can be prone to periods of withdrawal or intense frustration when things do not go your way. Your greatest challenge is managing your pride and recognizing that vulnerability is not a weakness but a necessary part of the human experience. When you find a cause worth fighting for, your dedication is absolute, and your impact is undeniable. You are a force of nature, capable of changing the world through the sheer power of your will and your refusal to be forgotten.

characters.name: Perseus
characters.short_description: You are the progeny of the resourceful monster-slayer who combined divine favor with practical ingenuity to achieve the impossible.
characters.profile_text:
You have a remarkable ability to stay cool under pressure, often finding creative solutions to problems that seem insurmountable. You are not one for grandstanding; instead, you focus on the task at hand and use every tool at your disposal to ensure success. You likely have a strong sense of justice and a protective streak, especially regarding your family and those you hold dear. Your success often comes from your ability to listen to advice and collaborate with others, recognizing that you do not have to face every challenge alone.

While you are brave, you are also cautious, preferring a well-laid plan over reckless action. You understand that the right equipment and the right timing are just as important as courage. Your life is defined by a series of well-earned victories, and you have a unique talent for turning your disadvantages into your greatest strengths. You move through the world with a quiet confidence, knowing that even the most terrifying monsters can be defeated if you keep your head and use your wits. You are a reliable ally and a steady hand in any crisis.

characters.name: Theseus
characters.short_description: You trace your lineage to the founder-hero of Athens, a man of civic duty who navigated the complexities of both the labyrinth and the political arena.
characters.profile_text:
You are a natural organizer and a builder of systems, often finding yourself in positions of leadership where you must balance the needs of many. You possess a logical mind that can untangle the most complicated situations, much like following a thread through a dark maze. You are deeply committed to your community and often feel a strong sense of responsibility to improve the world around you. You value order and justice, and you are willing to take the initiative to establish them where they are lacking.

This sense of duty can sometimes lead you to make difficult or unpopular decisions, as you prioritize the greater good over personal gain. You may struggle with the weight of your own expectations, occasionally losing sight of your personal life in the pursuit of your public goals. You are a complex individual who understands that heroism often requires compromise and careful thought. Despite the heavy crown you wear, your integrity and your ability to bring order to chaos make you a pillar of strength for everyone you know. You are the architect of your own destiny and the protector of your society.

characters.name: Jason
characters.short_description: You are the heir to the leader of the Argonauts, a visionary who excels at gathering talented individuals to achieve a singular, legendary goal.
characters.profile_text:
You are a person of great ambition and vision, always looking toward the next horizon and the next great prize. Your greatest strength lies in your ability to recognize talent in others and inspire them to work together toward a common objective. You are a diplomat and a recruiter, capable of building bridges between disparate groups to form a powerful team. You understand that no great feat is accomplished in isolation, and you take pride in the quality of the company you keep.

However, your reliance on others and your focus on the end goal can sometimes lead you to overlook the emotional needs of your companions or the ethical costs of your journey. You must be careful not to let your ambition cloud your judgment or lead you to abandon those who helped you reach the top. You are at your best when you are leading a crew toward a shared dream, using your charisma to navigate through dangerous waters. When you stay true to your team and your values, you are capable of orchestrating feats that change the course of history and earn you a place among the legends.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you encounter a massive, seemingly immovable obstacle, what is your primary instinct?

options.text: Tackle it head-on with sheer endurance and physical effort.
Find a clever way to outsmart or bypass the obstacle entirely.
Use the challenge as a stage to demonstrate my superior skills.
Identify the specific tool or niche weakness needed to dismantle it.
Establish a logical system or rule to manage the obstacle permanently.
Assemble a specialized team of experts to overcome it together.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these long-term goals resonates most with your personal ambition?

options.text: Achieving eternal fame and being recognized as the best in my field.
Securing a stable, peaceful home for myself and my loved ones.
Building a better society through justice and organized leadership.
Successfully leading a grand, visionary project to its completion.
Proving my worth and redemption through difficult, honest labor.
Protecting those I care about using resourcefulness and caution.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically behave when you are placed in a high-stakes environment?

options.text: I rely on my own grit and refuse to back down from any pressure.
I adapt my persona and tactics to fit the changing situation.
I thrive in the spotlight and perform with high-intensity passion.
I stay cool-headed and look for a practical, creative solution.
I take charge to ensure everyone follows a fair and orderly plan.
I focus on motivating my companions to keep our eyes on the prize.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you consider to be your most valuable character trait?

options.text: An indomitable will that can withstand any hardship.
A sharp, versatile intellect that can solve any puzzle.
A pursuit of excellence that settles for nothing less than the best.
The ability to use every available resource to achieve a goal.
A deep sense of civic duty and responsibility to others.
The charisma to bring diverse people together for a cause.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you respond when you feel you have been treated unfairly?

options.text: I feel the slight deeply and may withdraw until my honor is restored.
I calculate a strategic way to turn the situation to my advantage.
I channel my frustration into working harder to prove my critics wrong.
I seek a just resolution that benefits the community as a whole.
I use my ingenuity to quietly neutralize the threat or injustice.
I keep my focus on the mission, refusing to let ego distract me.

topics.display_name: Which Batman Villain Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic Batman Villain Is Your Secret Alter Ego?
synopsis.summary: Gotham City is a playground for the brilliant, the broken, and the bold. Whether you prefer chaos, cold logic, or a touch of theatricality, there is a legendary rogue that matches your unique personality. Take this quiz to discover which member of Batman's Rogues Gallery is pulling the strings in your life.

characters.name: The Joker
characters.short_description: You are the Clown Prince of Crime, an agent of chaos who finds humor in the darkest corners of existence.
characters.profile_text:
You are a wild card who thrives on unpredictability and the subversion of order. You do not care for material wealth or social status; instead, you seek to prove that everyone is just one bad day away from losing their sanity. Your strengths lie in your absolute lack of fear and your ability to improvise in any situation, making you a terrifyingly effective strategist because no one can guess your next move. You view life as a stage and every crime as a performance designed to mock the rigid structures of society.

However, your obsession with the punchline can be your downfall. You often prioritize a dramatic or symbolic gesture over practical success, leading you into dangerous confrontations just to see how they play out. While your charisma is undeniable, it is rooted in a nihilism that can alienate even your most loyal followers. You live for the thrill of the game, viewing life as a cosmic joke that only you are truly in on, and you will stop at nothing to ensure the world laughs along with you.

characters.name: The Riddler
characters.short_description: You are a master of puzzles and intellectual superiority, driven by a need to prove you are the smartest person in the room.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a brilliant, analytical mind that sees patterns where others see noise. You are not content with simple victories; you require your opponents to acknowledge your genius through complex games and intricate traps. Your meticulous planning and attention to detail ensure that you are always several steps ahead, turning every encounter into a test of wits that you expect to win. You value knowledge above all else and feel a deep sense of satisfaction when you outmaneuver those who rely on brute force.

Your greatest pitfall is your overwhelming ego and your compulsion to leave clues. You cannot help but flaunt your intellect, which often provides your enemies with the very tools they need to defeat you. You struggle with a deep-seated insecurity that manifests as a need for constant validation and intellectual dominance. While your intellect is unmatched, your inability to keep your plans simple or your mouth shut often leads to your eventual undoing. You are a prisoner of your own brilliance, forever seeking an equal who can actually solve your enigmas.

characters.name: Two-Face
characters.short_description: You are a figure of tragic duality, governed by a rigid sense of chance and the flip of a scarred coin.
characters.profile_text:
You are defined by a split personality and a fixation on the concept of binary justice. Once a pillar of law and order, you now believe that the only true fairness in a corrupt world is found in random chance. You are decisive and authoritative, but only when your coin dictates the path. This reliance on fate gives you a strange kind of integrity, as you never deviate from the result of the toss, no matter the consequences. You represent the thin line between the hero and the villain, embodying the internal struggle that haunts every soul.

Your internal conflict is your greatest burden, as you are constantly torn between your noble past and your vengeful present. This duality makes you highly volatile and difficult to negotiate with, as your moral compass can shift in an instant based on a fifty-fifty probability. While your commitment to fairness is absolute, it leaves no room for mercy, nuance, or personal growth. You are a prisoner to your own rituals, unable to act without the permission of a silver dollar, forever caught between the light and the dark.

characters.name: Catwoman
characters.short_description: You are a sophisticated thief and survivor who walks the fine line between hero and villain with grace and independence.
characters.profile_text:
You are a master of the heist, valuing your freedom and personal gain above all else. You possess an incredible level of agility and resourcefulness, allowing you to navigate the most dangerous environments with ease. You are not interested in world domination or senseless chaos; you simply want to live a life of luxury on your own terms. Your moral code is flexible, often leading you to help those in need if it aligns with your personal interests or your internal sense of justice. You are a creature of the night who thrives on the thrill of the chase.

Your independence is your greatest strength, but it can also lead to profound isolation. You find it difficult to fully trust others, often keeping even your closest allies at arm's length to protect yourself from betrayal. While you are highly skilled at manipulation and stealth, your attachment to certain people or causes can occasionally cloud your judgment and lead you into trouble. You are a survivor first and foremost, always ready to land on your feet no matter how high the fall, navigating the world with a sharp wit and sharper claws.

characters.name: The Penguin
characters.short_description: You are a shrewd businessman and underworld kingpin who uses wealth and influence to command respect.
characters.profile_text:
You are a master of high-society manipulation and organized crime, preferring the boardroom or the lounge to the front lines of a brawl. You have a refined taste for the finer things in life and use your legitimate business fronts to mask your more nefarious activities. Your strength lies in your ability to build networks, manage resources, and maintain a position of power through sheer intimidation and strategic alliances. You understand that in a city like Gotham, information and money are the most potent weapons one can possess.

Despite your outward sophistication, you are deeply sensitive to perceived slights and social rejection. Your desire for status and respect often stems from a lifetime of being treated as an outcast, making you prone to fits of rage when your dignity is challenged. You are a pragmatist who understands the value of leverage, but your vanity can sometimes make you blind to the ambitions of those working beneath you. You are a bird of prey in a tuxedo, always watching for the next opportunity to expand your empire and solidify your legacy.

characters.name: Scarecrow
characters.short_description: You are a master of psychology and fear, obsessed with uncovering the deepest phobias of the human mind.
characters.profile_text:
You view the world as a laboratory and humanity as your subjects. Your expertise in biochemistry and psychology allows you to manipulate the perceptions of others, turning their own minds against them. You are cold, calculating, and clinical, finding a dark satisfaction in the physiological response to terror. You do not seek power in the traditional sense; you seek the ultimate understanding of what makes people break. By stripping away the facade of bravery, you believe you are revealing the true nature of the human soul.

Your obsession with fear is both your greatest weapon and your most significant weakness. You often become so engrossed in your experiments that you neglect your own physical safety or the broader tactical situation. While you are brilliant at psychological warfare, you can be vulnerable when faced with an opponent who has mastered their own fears or who operates on pure instinct. You are a shadow in the night, a grim reminder that the greatest monsters are the ones we carry inside ourselves, and you will not stop until everyone has faced their own personal nightmare.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is the primary motivation behind your most ambitious plans?

options.text: To prove that I am the most brilliant mind in the room.
To secure a life of luxury and personal independence.
To create a chaotic spectacle that mocks social order.
To gain the respect and status I have always been denied.
To ensure that impartial fate decides the outcome.
To study the physiological and mental effects of terror.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle someone who attempts to thwart your goals?

options.text: I outsmart them with a complex series of traps and puzzles.
I use my wealth and influence to have them removed from the board.
I rely on my agility and stealth to bypass them without a fight.
I leave their fate entirely to the flip of a coin.
I exploit their deepest psychological vulnerabilities.
I respond with unpredictable and theatrical violence.

baseline_questions.question_text: In which environment do you feel most in control of your surroundings?

options.text: A private office filled with data and analytical tools.
An exclusive high-society club where I command the room.
The quiet rooftops where I can move unseen and free.
A courtroom or setting where absolute justice is dispensed.
A clinical laboratory where I can observe human behavior.
Anywhere I can turn the world into my personal stage.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you consider to be your greatest personal challenge?

options.text: My overwhelming need for intellectual validation from others.
My difficulty in forming genuine bonds of trust.
My intense sensitivity to perceived social slights.
The constant internal struggle between my two natures.
My tendency to view people as mere subjects for study.
My total lack of concern for the consequences of my actions.

baseline_questions.question_text: What kind of legacy do you hope to leave behind in the world?

options.text: A reputation as an unsolvable enigma and a master of logic.
A history of being a survivor who lived life on my own terms.
A vast empire of power that commands lasting respect.
A reminder that the only true fairness is found in chance.
A definitive understanding of the nature of human fear.
A world that finally understands the punchline to the joke.

topics.display_name: Which Pixar Protagonist Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic Pixar Protagonist Matches Your Soul?
synopsis.summary: From the depths of the ocean to the far reaches of outer space, Pixar has introduced us to characters that feel like family. Are you a natural-born leader who values loyalty above all else, or a dreamer looking for adventure in the great wide somewhere? Take this quiz to discover which legendary hero mirrors your personality and spirit. It's time to find out if you're more of a Woody, a Wall-E, or someone entirely different!

characters.name: Woody
characters.short_description: You are a loyal, natural-born leader who values tradition and the deep bonds of friendship above all else.
characters.profile_text: You are the glue that holds your social circle together, often taking on the responsibility of ensuring everyone is safe and accounted for. Your sense of duty is unmatched, and you find your greatest purpose in being there for the people who rely on you. While you can be a bit high-strung or prone to jealousy when your position is threatened, your heart is always in the right place. You prefer the comfort of the familiar and the security of a well-defined role within your community. Your strengths lie in your strategic thinking and your unwavering commitment to those you love. However, you may struggle with change or the feeling of being replaced. Learning to share the spotlight and embracing new perspectives is your path to growth. You are a classic soul who believes that loyalty is the highest virtue, and you will go to the ends of the earth to help a friend in need.

characters.name: Wall-E
characters.short_description: You are a gentle, curious soul who finds beauty in the mundane and possesses an infinite capacity for hope and love.
characters.profile_text: You have a unique way of looking at the world, often noticing the small, precious details that others overlook. Your curiosity is your greatest asset, driving you to explore and collect experiences that enrich your inner life. You are incredibly persistent, capable of performing repetitive tasks with a sense of wonder and dedication that is truly rare. While you might be quiet or socially awkward at times, your actions speak much louder than words ever could. You are a romantic at heart, seeking deep connections and a sense of belonging in a vast universe. Your pitfalls include a tendency to get lost in your own world or to become overly attached to objects and memories. You thrive when you have a clear purpose and someone to share your discoveries with. Your resilience and optimism are infectious, reminding everyone around you that even in the most desolate environments, life and love can still flourish.

characters.name: Merida
characters.short_description: You are a fiercely independent and spirited individual who refuses to be confined by tradition or the expectations of others.
characters.profile_text: You possess a wild heart and a sharp mind, always seeking to carve out your own path regardless of the obstacles in your way. You are highly skilled, energetic, and thrive when you are active and outdoors. Your independence is your pride, but it can sometimes manifest as stubbornness or a refusal to listen to the wisdom of those who care about you. You value your freedom above all else and are willing to fight for the right to choose your own destiny. While your impulsiveness can lead to unintended consequences, your bravery and willingness to admit your mistakes allow you to mend what has been broken. You are a trailblazer who inspires others to question the status quo. Your challenge is to balance your desire for autonomy with the importance of family and community. When you learn to listen as well as you lead, you become a powerful force for positive change in your world.

characters.name: Carl Fredricksen
characters.short_description: You are a steadfast and deeply sentimental person who hides a soft, adventurous heart beneath a gruff and pragmatic exterior.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of routine and deep-seated memories, often finding it difficult to let go of the past. Your loyalty to your loved ones is legendary, and you are willing to go to extreme lengths to honor their legacy. While you may come across as irritable or closed-off to strangers, this is often a defense mechanism to protect your sensitive nature. You possess a dry wit and a practical approach to problem-solving that serves you well in difficult situations. Your greatest strength is your ability to commit to a goal and see it through to the end, no matter how impossible it seems. However, your tendency to isolate yourself can prevent you from experiencing new joys and forming new connections. Your journey is one of learning that adventure is not just about a destination, but about the people you meet along the way. By opening your heart to the unexpected, you find that life still has plenty of surprises in store for you.

characters.name: Joy
characters.short_description: You are an irrepressible optimist who strives to find the silver lining in every situation and keep the spirits of those around you high.
characters.profile_text: You are the ultimate cheerleader, fueled by a relentless drive to ensure that happiness prevails. Your energy is boundless, and you have a natural talent for organizing and motivating others to achieve a common goal. You believe that every problem has a solution and that a positive attitude is the key to overcoming any obstacle. While your enthusiasm is inspiring, it can sometimes lead you to dismiss or suppress difficult emotions, both in yourself and in others. You may struggle with the realization that sadness and frustration are necessary parts of the human experience. Your growth comes from understanding that true emotional health requires a balance of all feelings, not just the happy ones. You are a visionary who sees the best in everyone, and your presence can light up even the darkest room. When you learn to embrace the complexity of life, your ability to lead and support others becomes even more profound and authentic.

characters.name: Miguel
characters.short_description: You are a passionate and creative dreamer who is determined to follow your heart and share your unique talents with the world.
characters.profile_text: You possess a vibrant spirit and a deep connection to your heritage, even when you feel at odds with the traditions of your family. Your creativity is a fundamental part of who you are, and you feel a powerful calling to express yourself through your art or music. You are brave enough to step into the unknown to find your truth, showing a level of determination that is truly admirable. While your single-minded focus on your goals can sometimes cause you to neglect the feelings of those closest to you, your ultimate desire is to find a way to bridge the gap between your dreams and your roots. You are a bridge-builder, capable of bringing people together through the power of storytelling and shared history. Your pitfalls include a tendency to be impulsive or to keep secrets to avoid conflict. By being honest about your needs and honoring the sacrifices of those who came before you, you find a sense of peace and fulfillment that allows your talent to truly shine.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a major life change or an unexpected shift in your routine, what is your primary internal reaction?

options.text: I feel a sense of duty to manage the situation and keep everyone safe.
I feel a spark of excitement and immediately look for the silver lining.
I feel resistant and prefer to hold onto the memories of how things were.
I feel a surge of independence and see it as a chance to break free from old rules.
I feel curious and observe the new environment with quiet wonder.
I feel a drive to follow my passion, even if it means venturing into the unknown.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these roles do you most naturally inhabit within a group setting?

options.text: The responsible leader who ensures the group stays together.
The energetic motivator who keeps the mood light and positive.
The quiet observer who focuses on small details others miss.
The rebel who challenges the status quo to find a better way.
The pragmatic realist who provides stability and experience.
The creative soul who wants to share their unique vision with the world.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you value most when it comes to your personal legacy or how others perceive you?

options.text: Being known as someone who was unfailingly loyal to their friends.
Being recognized for my unique talents and artistic expression.
Being respected for my bravery and the courage to choose my own path.
Being remembered for the joy and happiness I brought to others.
Being appreciated for my persistence and ability to find beauty in anything.
Being honored for my commitment to my family and my history.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle difficult emotions like sadness or frustration?

options.text: I try to push them aside quickly to focus on being productive and happy.
I retreat into my own world and find comfort in my hobbies or collections.
I might get a bit irritable or gruff, keeping my softer feelings guarded.
I express them through my art or by seeking out the truth of my heritage.
I confront the source of the frustration head-on, often with a fiery spirit.
I worry about how my feelings might affect the stability of my community.

baseline_questions.question_text: If you were given a free day with no responsibilities, how would you most likely spend it?

options.text: Organizing a group activity to make sure everyone is having a great time.
Practicing a craft or skill that allows me to express my inner self.
Exploring the outdoors and testing my physical limits and skills.
Tidying my space and finding new uses for old, interesting objects.
Relaxing in a familiar environment surrounded by meaningful mementos.
Checking in on my closest friends to see if they need any help.

topics.display_name: Which Legend of Zelda Race Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Legend of Zelda Race Do You Belong To?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered if you would thrive in the fiery depths of Death Mountain or the serene waters of Zora's Domain? From the courageous Hylians to the mischievous Koroks, the land of Hyrule is home to diverse cultures and unique abilities. Take this quiz to discover which iconic race matches your personality and where you truly belong in the kingdom. Grab your Master Sword and let's find out!

characters.name: Hylian
characters.short_description: You are a versatile and courageous individual who values tradition and the pursuit of destiny.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a balanced nature and a deep sense of duty that allows you to adapt to almost any situation. Like the chosen heroes of legend, you are often driven by a strong moral compass and a desire to protect those around you. You value wisdom and history, often finding yourself at the center of important events because of your willingness to step up when others hesitate. Your pointed ears are said to hear the voices of the gods, reflecting your spiritual intuition and connection to the world's ancient roots.

Sometimes your sense of responsibility can lead to a heavy burden of expectation. You might struggle with the pressure of living up to a specific legacy or feeling like the weight of the world rests solely on your shoulders. However, your resilience and ability to forge strong bonds with diverse groups of people ensure that you never have to face your trials alone. You are the glue that holds society together, blending tradition with the courage to face an uncertain future.

characters.name: Goron
characters.short_description: You are a steadfast and warm-hearted powerhouse who values brotherhood and physical endurance.
characters.profile_text:
You are known for your immense strength and your even larger heart, often prioritizing the well-being of your community above all else. You thrive in environments that others might find harsh, finding comfort in the steady heat of the forge or the solid embrace of the mountains. Your personality is as rock-solid as your exterior; you are dependable, honest, and possess a jovial spirit that can lighten the mood in even the darkest caves. You value physical labor and the satisfaction of a job well done.

While your loyalty is unmatched, your stubbornness can sometimes make it difficult for you to change course once you have set your mind on something. You might occasionally overlook the finer details of a situation in favor of a direct, forceful approach. Nevertheless, your bravery and willingness to roll headfirst into danger to protect your friends make you an invaluable ally. You are a pillar of strength for everyone you know, offering a firm hand and a loud laugh to anyone in need.

characters.name: Zora
characters.short_description: You are a graceful and long-lived soul who values elegance, tradition, and the fluid nature of life.
characters.profile_text:
You move through life with a natural poise and a deep appreciation for the arts and history. Like the waters you inhabit, you can be calm and serene one moment or a powerful force of nature the next. You likely possess a refined taste and a strong sense of pride in your heritage, often taking a long-term view of events due to your enduring nature. Your loyalty is deep and unwavering, flowing steadily toward those you have deemed worthy of your trust and affection.

Your high standards and attachment to tradition can sometimes come across as aloofness or a resistance to change. You may find it difficult to relate to those who live more fleeting, chaotic lives, leading to a occasional sense of isolation. However, when you open your heart, you offer a depth of emotion and a level of commitment that is as vast and enduring as the ocean itself. You are a guardian of culture and a symbol of timeless beauty in a rapidly changing world.

characters.name: Gerudo
characters.short_description: You are a fierce and independent warrior who thrives on self-reliance and the harsh beauty of the desert.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a commanding presence and a spirit tempered by the challenges of your environment. You value strength, skill, and the bonds of your community, believing that one’s worth is proven through action rather than words. Your independence is your greatest asset, allowing you to survive and flourish where others would falter. You are likely highly disciplined, with a sharp mind and a sharper sense of justice that guides your every move through the shifting sands of life.

Your self-reliant nature can sometimes make it hard for you to ask for help or show vulnerability. You might build walls around yourself as sturdy as a desert fortress, keeping others at a distance to maintain your image of invincibility. Yet, those who earn your respect will find a protector who is fiercely loyal and a leader who will stop at nothing to ensure the safety of her people. You are a force to be reckoned with, combining iron will with a vibrant, desert-born spirit.

characters.name: Rito
characters.short_description: You are a free-spirited and observant individual who values perspective and the thrill of the wind.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a unique vantage point on the world, often preferring to look at the big picture from a distance before diving in. Your love for freedom and exploration is unmatched, and you feel most at home when you are moving toward new horizons. You likely have a sharp wit and a talent for communication, whether through song, story, or a well-timed observation. Your agility is not just physical; you are mentally quick and able to navigate complex social currents with ease.

Your desire for independence and your tendency to stay above the fray can sometimes make you appear detached or even arrogant to those on the ground. You might struggle with commitments that feel like they are clipping your wings or grounding your ambitions. However, your ability to see what others miss and your readiness to soar to the aid of your friends make you a vital and inspiring presence. You remind everyone that there is always a higher perspective to be found if one has the courage to fly.

characters.name: Korok
characters.short_description: You are a whimsical and hidden spirit who finds joy in the small wonders of the natural world.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a playful and gentle nature, often finding happiness in simple pleasures and the quiet beauty of the forest. You are a master of blending in, preferring to observe the world from a safe, leafy distance rather than being the center of attention. Your creativity is boundless, and you likely enjoy making things or playing tricks that bring a smile to others' faces. You have a deep connection to the earth and a sense of wonder that keeps your spirit eternally youthful and vibrant.

Your shy and elusive nature can sometimes lead to you being overlooked or misunderstood by those who move too quickly. You might find the demands of the wider world overwhelming, preferring the safety of your familiar groves to the uncertainty of the unknown. Despite this, your presence brings a touch of magic to the world, and those who take the time to find you are rewarded with a friendship that is as pure and refreshing as a spring breeze. You are the hidden heartbeat of the wild, reminding others to slow down and notice the small things.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically prefer to spend your leisure time?

options.text: Participating in community events or learning about local history.
Relaxing with close friends and enjoying a hearty meal.
Engaging in refined arts or swimming in peaceful waters.
Training to master a new skill or testing my physical limits.
Exploring new heights and seeking out a better vantage point.
Playing lighthearted pranks or finding hidden spots in nature.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary approach when faced with a sudden obstacle?

options.text: I adapt my strategy based on what the situation requires.
I use my strength to push through it directly and honestly.
I remain calm and wait for the most graceful moment to act.
I rely solely on my own abilities to overcome the challenge.
I analyze the situation from a distance to find a clever way around.
I try to find a creative or whimsical way to bypass the problem.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these environments feels most like home to you?

options.text: A bustling village filled with tradition and diverse people.
A warm, rugged mountain where the community is tight-knit.
A serene, elegant palace surrounded by flowing water.
A vast, harsh landscape that rewards the strong and disciplined.
A high-altitude outpost with endless views of the horizon.
A secret, lush forest where I can stay hidden and safe.

baseline_questions.question_text: What quality do you value most in a close companion?

options.text: A shared sense of duty and a strong moral compass.
Unwavering loyalty and a jovial, dependable spirit.
Elegance, poise, and a deep respect for tradition.
Fierce independence and the strength to stand alone.
A sharp wit and the desire for total freedom.
A playful nature and an appreciation for small wonders.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you want to be remembered by others?

options.text: As a versatile protector who upheld the legacy of my people.
As a pillar of strength who was always there for my brothers.
As a graceful soul who preserved beauty and history.
As a formidable warrior who never backed down from a fight.
As a free spirit who saw the world from a unique perspective.
As a joyful presence who brought a touch of magic to the world.

topics.display_name: Which Seinfeld Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic 'Seinfeld' Character Are You Actually?
synopsis.summary: Are you the master of your domain or just a hipster doofus? It is time to find out which member of the New York City quartet truly matches your neurotic tendencies and unique social graces. Whether you are obsessing over a shirt button or inventing a new holiday, this quiz will reveal your inner Upper West Side resident.

characters.name: Jerry Seinfeld
characters.short_description: You are the observational center of your social circle, maintaining a detached and witty perspective on life's minor inconveniences.
characters.profile_text:
You are a person of routine and precision, often finding yourself more interested in the mechanics of a social interaction than the emotional weight behind it. Your life is characterized by a clean aesthetic, both in your physical surroundings and your interpersonal relationships. You have a knack for spotting the absurdity in the mundane, and while others might get bogged down by drama, you prefer to stand back and make a joke about it. This detachment is your greatest strength, allowing you to navigate chaos without getting your hands dirty.

However, your commitment to being even-steven can sometimes make you appear cold or superficial to those who crave deeper connection. You tend to break up with people over trivial flaws, like a weird laugh or a bad shirt, because you value your personal comfort and logic over messy emotional compromises. You are the glue that holds your eccentric group together, providing the stable, cynical foundation upon which everyone else's madness is built.

characters.name: Elaine Benes
characters.short_description: You are a sharp-tongued, ambitious professional who isn't afraid to push back against the world's many annoyances.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a vibrant energy and a low tolerance for incompetence, making you a formidable presence in both the workplace and your social life. You are highly intelligent and often find yourself frustrated by the lack of common sense in others. Whether you are fighting for a fair price on a coat or navigating the complexities of high-society publishing, you approach every challenge with a mix of wit and raw determination. You aren't afraid to speak your mind, even if it means getting into a heated argument in a movie theater or a taxi.

Your pitfalls usually involve your temper and your tendency to get caught up in the big struggle of the moment. You can be judgmental and occasionally self-sabotaging when your pride is on the line. Despite these outbursts, you are a loyal friend who values authenticity above all else. You want to be successful and respected, but you refuse to play by the traditional rules of ladylike behavior, preferring to dance to your own beat—even if that dance is famously terrible.

characters.name: George Costanza
characters.short_description: You are a master of neurotic strategy and self-preservation, often finding yourself entangled in complex webs of your own making.
characters.profile_text:
You are driven by a unique blend of insecurity and a desperate need for validation, which often leads you to take the path of most resistance. You are the king of the calculated risk that almost never pays off, frequently lying about your profession or your intentions to gain a temporary advantage. Your life is a series of small victories overshadowed by spectacular, self-inflicted defeats. You are deeply frugal, highly suspicious of others' motives, and possess an uncanny ability to hold a grudge for decades.

While your neuroses can be exhausting, they also make you incredibly resilient in the face of embarrassment. You have a vivid imagination that you use primarily to construct elaborate excuses or to envision scenarios where you finally come out on top. Your strength lies in your persistence; no matter how many times life knocks you down, you are already planning your next scheme before you even hit the ground. You are a master of the petty grievance, turning every minor slight into a grand conspiracy against your happiness.

characters.name: Cosmo Kramer
characters.short_description: You are a free-spirited eccentric who lives life entirely on your own terms, fueled by luck and an unshakeable sense of confidence.
characters.profile_text:
You are a whirlwind of physical energy and unconventional ideas, moving through the world with a grace that defies logic. You don't follow the standard rules of society, such as holding a steady job or respecting personal boundaries, yet things always seem to work out for you. Whether you are stumbling into a modeling gig or inventing a man-zier, your life is a series of bizarre adventures that most people couldn't even dream of. You are remarkably uninhibited, saying exactly what is on your mind without a filter.

Your greatest asset is your total lack of pretense and your genuine, if chaotic, kindness. You are the neighbor who is always there to borrow some fruit or offer a piece of unsolicited, yet surprisingly profound, advice. However, your impulsiveness can lead you into ridiculous situations, and your lack of focus often leaves your friends cleaning up your messes. You are a rare individual who has truly mastered the art of being yourself, existing in a state of constant, frantic wonder that keeps everyone around you on their toes.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically react to a minor social annoyance, like someone talking loudly in a movie theater?

options.text: I make a quiet, sarcastic joke about it to whoever I am with.
I shush them immediately and demand they show some respect.
I stare at the back of their head and seethe with silent, internal rage.
I turn around and try to join their conversation.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which best describes your philosophy on work and career?

options.text: I prefer a steady, predictable routine that allows for plenty of personal time.
I am ambitious and want to be a respected professional in my field.
I try to find the path of least resistance and do as little as possible.
I am always looking for a creative venture or a unique way to strike it rich.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you handle your personal living space and belongings?

options.text: I keep everything meticulously clean and organized at all times.
It is functional and professional, though it gets messy when I am stressed.
It is my bunker where I hide from the world and keep my cheap finds.
It is a revolving door for friends and a laboratory for my latest ideas.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary deal-breaker when you are dating someone new?

options.text: A trivial physical flaw or a minor, annoying personal habit.
A lack of intelligence or a failure to understand common sense.
The fear that they are actually too good for me and will eventually leave.
They are too conventional and try to place limits on my lifestyle.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you find yourself in a difficult situation, what is your go-to strategy?

options.text: I maintain a detached perspective and wait for things to even out.
I confront the problem head-on, even if it leads to a heated argument.
I construct an elaborate lie or a complex scheme to get myself out of it.
I rely on my instincts and assume that things will just work out for me.

topics.display_name: Which Golden Age Hollywood Icon Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Golden Age Hollywood Icon Are You?
synopsis.summary: Step back into the era of glitz, glamour, and silver screen magic to find your vintage alter ego. From the sharp wit of screwball comedies to the brooding intensity of film noir, your personality matches a legendary star of the past. Answer these questions about your style and values to discover which icon defines your soul.

characters.name: Katharine Hepburn
characters.short_description: You are a fiercely independent trailblazer who values intellect and authenticity over societal expectations.
characters.profile_text: You possess a sharp mind and an even sharper tongue, never afraid to stand your ground or challenge the status quo. Your strength lies in your unwavering self-reliance and your refusal to conform to traditional standards of femininity or behavior. You likely prefer practical elegance and intellectual pursuits, finding more joy in a spirited debate or a physical challenge than in superficial social graces. This rugged individualism makes you a natural leader, though your bluntness can sometimes be mistaken for arrogance by those who do not know you well. While your confidence is your greatest asset, your tendency to go it alone can occasionally lead to isolation. You value deep, meaningful connections based on mutual respect and shared intelligence rather than mere sentimentality. Your life is defined by a relentless pursuit of excellence and a commitment to living on your own terms, regardless of the cost. You are a true original, a force of nature who inspires others to find their own voices and embrace their unique quirks.

characters.name: Humphrey Bogart
characters.short_description: You are a stoic realist with a hidden heart of gold, navigating a complex world with grit and integrity.
characters.profile_text: You present a tough, cynical exterior to the world, but beneath that weary facade lies a strict moral code and a deep sense of loyalty. You are not one for grand gestures or flowery language; instead, you let your actions speak for your character. You have a knack for seeing through deception and possess a dry, understated wit that helps you navigate even the most treacherous social waters. People look to you for stability and truth, even when the truth is uncomfortable to hear. Your primary challenge is your tendency to keep others at arm's length to protect your inner world. While your self-sufficiency is admirable, it can sometimes prevent you from forming the very bonds you secretly crave. You are most comfortable in the shadows or on the fringes, observing the world with a critical eye. However, when the stakes are high, you are the first to step up and do the right thing, proving that your integrity is unshakeable and your word is your bond.

characters.name: Marlene Dietrich
characters.short_description: You are an enigmatic and sophisticated visionary who masters the art of self-presentation and quiet power.
characters.profile_text: You possess an aura of mystery and a command of style that makes you the center of attention without ever having to raise your voice. You understand the power of image and use it to your advantage, often blurring lines and defying expectations to create something entirely new. Your discipline is legendary, and you approach every aspect of your life with a meticulous eye for detail and a commitment to aesthetic perfection. You are not just a person; you are an experience, leaving a lasting impression on everyone you encounter. This level of control can sometimes make you seem distant or unapproachable to others. You value your privacy and carefully curate who gets to see the person behind the persona. While you are deeply devoted to those in your inner circle, you maintain a certain level of detachment that allows you to remain objective and resilient. Your strength comes from your ability to reinvent yourself while staying true to your core values, making you a timeless icon of grace and strength.

characters.name: Cary Grant
characters.short_description: You are the epitome of effortless charm and wit, moving through life with a polished grace and a twinkle in your eye.
characters.profile_text: You have a natural ability to put others at ease, using your quick wit and impeccable manners to navigate any social situation. You value harmony and aesthetics, often acting as the glue that holds your social circles together. Your sense of humor is your greatest tool, allowing you to deflect tension and find the lighthearted side of even the most difficult circumstances. You strive for a life of balance and refinement, where every detail is considered and every interaction is meaningful. Beneath your smooth exterior, you may struggle with a desire for perfection that can lead to internal anxiety. You work hard to maintain your composure, sometimes at the expense of expressing your true vulnerabilities. However, your genuine kindness and ability to see the best in others make you a beloved figure. You are a master of the light touch, proving that one can be both sophisticated and deeply human. Your legacy is one of joy, style, and the enduring power of a well-timed joke.

characters.name: Bette Davis
characters.short_description: You are a powerhouse of raw emotion and uncompromising talent, never backing down from a challenge or a fight.
characters.profile_text: You are defined by your intensity and your refusal to settle for anything less than total commitment. Whether in your career or your personal life, you throw yourself into everything you do with a passion that can be both inspiring and intimidating. You have little patience for mediocrity or pretense, and you are not afraid to ruffle feathers to achieve your goals. Your expressive nature and sharp intellect make you a formidable presence, and you command respect through your sheer force of will and undeniable capability. Your fiery temperament can sometimes lead to conflict, as you are not one to compromise your vision for the sake of politeness. You value honesty above all else and expect the same from those around you. While your path may be marked by struggle, your resilience is unmatched, and you view every obstacle as an opportunity to prove your worth. You are a true fighter who leaves an indelible mark on the world, driven by a need to express your truth and leave nothing on the table.

characters.name: Grace Kelly
characters.short_description: You embody a serene and classic elegance, possessing a quiet strength that commands respect and admiration.
characters.profile_text: You move through the world with a poise that suggests an inner peace and a clear sense of purpose. You are the master of the understated, knowing that true power often lies in what is left unsaid. Your approach to life is characterized by a refined sensibility and a deep respect for tradition and duty. You possess a natural dignity that draws people to you, and you handle both success and adversity with a level-headedness that is truly rare. You are the calm in the center of the storm. Because you are so composed, others may sometimes mistake your reserve for coldness. In reality, you are deeply observant and possess a rich emotional life that you share only with those you trust implicitly. You value loyalty, family, and the pursuit of a meaningful life over the fleeting allure of fame or excitement. Your strength is not loud or aggressive; it is a steady, enduring force that allows you to navigate the complexities of high-stakes environments with grace and integrity.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a direct challenge to your authority or beliefs, what is your immediate reaction?

options.text: I confront it head-on with fiery intensity and refuse to back down.
I use sharp wit and logic to dismantle their argument and assert my independence.
I maintain a cool, stoic exterior and let my actions prove them wrong.
I handle the situation with quiet poise and diplomatic grace.
I use charm and humor to diffuse the tension and win them over.
I remain enigmatic and detached, exerting power through my presence alone.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your personal philosophy regarding social gatherings?

I prefer small, intellectual circles where I can speak my mind freely.

I curate a specific image and command the room with sophisticated mystery.
I act as the gracious host, ensuring everything is refined and harmonious.
I am often the center of a spirited debate, regardless of the setting.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you value most in your closest relationships?

options.text: Unwavering loyalty and a shared sense of integrity.
Intellectual equality and the freedom to be my authentic self.
Total emotional honesty and a passion that matches my own.
Mutual respect, tradition, and a sense of shared duty.
Lighthearted companionship and a shared appreciation for the finer things.
A deep, private connection that respects my need for autonomy.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle a situation where you feel vulnerable or hurt?

options.text: I hide it behind a cynical or tough exterior to protect myself.
I channel that emotion into my work or a creative outlet with raw power.
I maintain my composure and deal with it privately and elegantly.
I use self-deprecating humor to mask my discomfort and move on.
I retreat into my own world, maintaining a disciplined and detached facade.
I address the cause of the hurt directly and move forward with self-reliance.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which aesthetic or lifestyle choice most resonates with your soul?

Gritty realism: simple, honest, and unpretentious.

Polished refinement: balanced, witty, and aesthetically pleasing.
Classic serenity: timeless, dignified, and traditional.

topics.display_name: Which 90s Boy Band Member Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 90s Boy Band Member Are You?
synopsis.summary: Dust off your CD player and grab your butterfly clips because it’s time to find out which pop icon matches your vibe. Whether you were the sensitive soul or the edgy rebel, your 90s preferences reveal your true boy band identity. Take this quiz to see if you're more of a frosted-tip frontman or a smooth-harmony sweetheart.

characters.name: Justin Timberlake
characters.short_description: You are the charismatic trendsetter who effortlessly commands the spotlight with a blend of smooth confidence and undeniable talent.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a natural magnetism that draws people toward you, often finding yourself at the center of any group dynamic. Your ambition is matched only by your work ethic, allowing you to transition seamlessly between different roles and creative projects. You have a keen eye for what is current and cool, often setting the pace for others to follow rather than chasing after existing trends. You are a visionary who knows how to package your skills for maximum impact.

However, your drive for perfection can sometimes make you appear overly focused on your own trajectory. While you are a team player, your individual spark is hard to contain, and you thrive best when you have the freedom to express your unique vision. You value precision in your craft and expect the same level of dedication from those around you, making you a formidable leader and a captivating performer who always leaves the audience wanting more.

characters.name: Nick Carter
characters.short_description: You are the quintessential heartthrob whose youthful energy and infectious enthusiasm make you a beloved presence in any circle.
characters.profile_text:
You bring a vibrant, almost restless energy to everything you do, often acting as the spark plug for your social group. Your charm is effortless, rooted in a mix of boyish innocence and a hint of a rebellious streak that keeps people guessing. You are deeply loyal to your friends and family, viewing your inner circle as a sanctuary where you can truly be yourself away from the public eye. You have a natural ability to make others feel special just by being in your presence.

Your impulsive nature can sometimes lead you into tricky situations, as you tend to follow your heart before consulting your head. Despite this, your resilience is one of your greatest strengths; you have a remarkable ability to bounce back from setbacks with a smile. You appreciate the finer things in life but never lose sight of the hard work required to maintain your success and your connections, ensuring you remain a staple in the hearts of those who know you.

characters.name: AJ McLean
characters.short_description: You are the edgy soul of the group, known for your expressive style and a deep, emotional complexity that sets you apart.
characters.profile_text:
You aren't afraid to stand out, often using your personal style and creative choices to signal your individuality. You possess a soulful depth that allows you to connect with others on a profound level, making you the person friends turn to when they need genuine empathy. Your passion is your primary fuel, driving you to pour your heart into every endeavor, whether it is a professional project or a personal relationship. You are the one who adds flavor and grit to any collaboration.

This intensity can be a double-edged sword, as you feel both the highs and the lows of life more acutely than most. You may struggle with maintaining balance, occasionally letting your emotions dictate your path rather than logic. Nevertheless, your authenticity is your greatest asset, and your willingness to be vulnerable makes you a powerful and relatable figure to those who value honesty and raw talent. You are a true original who refuses to blend into the background.

characters.name: Joey McIntyre
characters.short_description: You are the classic performer with a theatrical flair and a powerful voice that ensures you are never overlooked.
characters.profile_text:
You have a background that likely involves a love for the stage and a disciplined approach to your talents. Your personality is a blend of old-school charm and high-octane energy, making you a delight to be around in social settings. You take great pride in your abilities and are constantly looking for ways to refine your skills, often pushing yourself harder than anyone else would dream of. You have a knack for storytelling and an ability to convey deep emotion through your work.

While you enjoy the attention that comes with your talents, you are also deeply grounded in your roots and value the traditions that shaped you. You can be quite sensitive to criticism because you put so much of yourself into your work, but this sensitivity also makes you a more nuanced and thoughtful friend. You are the one who brings the wow factor to the table, consistently delivering high-quality results with a theatrical flourish that leaves a lasting impression.

characters.name: JC Chasez
characters.short_description: You are the dedicated craftsman who prioritizes technical excellence and artistic integrity above the lure of fame.
characters.profile_text:
You are often the backbone of your team, providing the technical skill and steady focus needed to turn a good idea into a great one. You prefer to let your work speak for itself, often shying away from the more superficial aspects of public life in favor of honing your craft. Your work ethic is legendary, and you have a rare ability to stay concentrated on complex tasks for long periods, ensuring every detail is perfect. You are the quiet powerhouse whose contributions are essential to the group's success.

Because you are so focused on the internal mechanics of your projects, you might sometimes be perceived as reserved or even distant. You value privacy and intellectual stimulation, seeking out collaborators who challenge you rather than those who simply agree with you. Your strength lies in your consistency and your refusal to compromise on quality, making you a respected figure among peers who truly understand the depth of your contribution and the purity of your artistic intent.

baseline_questions.question_text: When working as part of a team, which role do you naturally gravitate toward?

options.text: The visionary leader who sets the pace and direction.
The energetic motivator who keeps the group's spirits high.
The creative individualist who adds a unique, edgy perspective.
The disciplined performer who ensures the final output is polished.
The technical expert who focuses on the quality of the work itself.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you prefer to handle public attention or the 'spotlight'?

options.text: I command it effortlessly and use it to showcase my charisma.
I enjoy the fun of it but prefer sharing the moment with my inner circle.
I use it as a platform for raw, authentic self-expression.
I treat it as a stage to deliver a powerful, theatrical performance.
I'd rather stay out of it and let my accomplishments speak for me.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your personal style and aesthetic?

options.text: Trendsetting and sleek; I'm always ahead of the curve.
Youthful and vibrant; I like a look that is approachable and cool.
Bold and expressive; I use my appearance to signal my individuality.
Classic and refined; I appreciate a sense of tradition and flair.
Understated and precise; I value quality over flashiness.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation when starting a new project?

options.text: The ambition to be the best and reach the top of my field.
The excitement of the journey and the people I'll meet.
The need to pour my heart and soul into something meaningful.
The desire to master a craft and tell a compelling story.
The pursuit of technical excellence and artistic integrity.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically process your emotions during a difficult time?

options.text: I stay focused on my goals and keep moving forward.
I rely on my resilience and the support of my loyal friends.
I feel things deeply and use that intensity as creative fuel.
I reflect on my experiences and look for the narrative or lesson.
I analyze the situation logically and maintain my privacy.

topics.display_name: Which Alice in Wonderland Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'Alice in Wonderland' Character Matches Your Curious Soul?
synopsis.summary: Have you ever felt like you've fallen down a rabbit hole of your own making? Whether you're hosting a perpetual tea party or shouting 'Off with their heads!', there's a bit of Wonderland in everyone. Take this whimsical journey through the Looking Glass to discover which iconic Lewis Carroll creation truly mirrors your personality.

characters.name: Alice
characters.short_description: You are a curious and logical explorer who navigates a chaotic world with a sense of wonder and a touch of stubbornness.
characters.profile_text: You possess an insatiable curiosity that often leads you into unexpected situations, yet you maintain a grounded sense of logic even when the world around you defies it. You are not afraid to ask difficult questions or challenge the status quo, though your directness can sometimes be mistaken for impoliteness. Your strength lies in your adaptability and your refusal to lose your sense of self, even when your physical or social environment shifts dramatically. However, you may struggle with feelings of being out of place or misunderstood by those who prefer rigid rules over imaginative exploration. You value fairness and truth, often acting as the moral compass in a room full of nonsense. While your journey might feel overwhelming at times, your resilience ensures that you always find your way back to your own reality, enriched by the lessons you have learned.

characters.name: The White Rabbit
characters.short_description: You are a high-strung and punctual individual who is constantly driven by a sense of duty and the pressure of the clock.
characters.profile_text: You are defined by your meticulous attention to detail and an almost obsessive concern with time and protocol. You often feel as though you are running behind, which can lead to a state of perpetual anxiety and a tendency to overlook the beauty of the present moment in favor of your next appointment. Your strengths include your reliability and your deep respect for authority and tradition, making you an essential part of any structured organization. You are the one who keeps things moving, even if you are doing so while muttering to yourself in a panic. On the downside, your fear of failure or being late can make you appear dismissive or frantic to those around you. You may find it difficult to relax or engage in spontaneous fun because your mind is always three steps ahead on your to-do list. Learning to pause and breathe is your greatest challenge, but your dedication is truly unmatched.

characters.name: The Mad Hatter
