characters.profile_text: You are driven by a sense of adventure and a willingness to gamble on the unknown. While others might see a handful of beans, you see a world of possibility and a way to change your fortune forever. You aren't afraid to climb to heights that would terrify most people, fueled by a mix of curiosity and the desire to provide a better life for those you love. Your quick thinking and agility allow you to navigate dangerous situations and outsmart giants that stand in your way. Your impulsive nature is both your greatest asset and your biggest pitfall. You sometimes act before fully considering the consequences, which can lead to precarious situations that require a narrow escape. While your luck often holds out, you must learn to balance your daring spirit with a bit of foresight. You thrive when life is unpredictable, proving that sometimes the biggest rewards come from the most unlikely investments.

characters.name: Snow White
characters.short_description: You are a gentle and optimistic spirit who finds harmony in nature and builds community wherever you go.
characters.profile_text: You have a natural ability to bring people together and create a sense of home, no matter where you find yourself. Your kindness is infectious, and you tend to see the best in everyone, which often inspires them to be their best selves in return. You find peace in the simple rhythms of life and have a deep connection to the natural world around you. Your presence is a calming influence, and you are often the heart of any group you join, providing care and organization with a light touch. Because you are so inherently trusting, you can be vulnerable to those who do not have your best interests at heart. Your innocence is a beautiful trait, but it sometimes prevents you from seeing the shadows that others might cast. You must learn that while the world is full of wonder, it also requires a degree of discernment. Your resilience is found in your ability to wake up after a setback, ready to embrace a new day with the same open heart you’ve always had.

characters.name: Little Red Riding Hood
characters.short_description: You are a dutiful and observant individual who is learning to navigate the complexities and hidden dangers of the world.
characters.profile_text: You are characterized by your loyalty to family and your willingness to venture into the unknown to help those you care about. You approach life with a sense of purpose, often following a path laid out for you, but your journey frequently takes you into territory where things are not always as they seem. You possess a keen sense of observation, noticing the sharp teeth and hungry eyes of the world, even if you don't always realize the danger until it is close at hand. Your journey is one of loss of innocence and the gaining of wisdom. You may start out naive, but your experiences teach you the importance of staying on the path and being wary of silver-tongued strangers. Your strength comes from your ability to survive these encounters and emerge more vigilant and self-aware. You are a protector at heart, and as you grow, you become the one who can spot the wolf in sheep's clothing before anyone else does.

characters.name: Beauty (from Beauty and the Beast)
characters.short_description: You are an intellectual and compassionate person who looks beneath the surface to find the true value in others.
characters.profile_text: You are someone who values substance over style and intellect over appearance. While others may be distracted by superficial charms or frightened by rough exteriors, you have the patience and the heart to look deeper. You are often found lost in a book or exploring new ideas, as your inner world is just as vast as the one outside. Your bravery isn't found in physical combat, but in your willingness to sacrifice your own comfort for the sake of your family and your ability to stand your ground in difficult circumstances. Sometimes, your desire to see the good in others can lead you to stay in challenging situations longer than you should, hoping for a transformation that may or may not come. You are a healer and a teacher by nature, but you must remember that your own needs and freedom are just as important as the redemption of those you care for. Your love is a powerful force that can break any curse, provided you continue to value your own voice and agency.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically react when presented with a high-stakes opportunity that carries significant risk?

options.text: I dive in headfirst, trusting my intuition and luck to carry me through.
I observe the situation from every angle, looking for hidden dangers before I move.
I analyze the intellectual value and long-term potential before making a choice.
I remain patient and wait for a clear sign that it is the right path for me.
I focus on how the opportunity might help me create a better environment for others.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your role within a group or community?

options.text: The peacemaker who brings people together and keeps spirits high.
The intellectual who looks for deeper meaning and substance in every interaction.
The resilient worker who stays steady and reliable even when overlooked.
The bold adventurer who isn't afraid to challenge the status quo.
The vigilant protector who keeps a sharp eye out for potential trouble.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you encounter someone who seems difficult or intimidating, what is your first instinct?

options.text: To look beneath their rough exterior to find their hidden goodness.
To treat them with unwavering kindness, hoping to soften their heart.
To stay on the designated path and avoid unnecessary interaction.
To find a clever way to outsmart them if they stand in my way.
To endure the situation with quiet dignity until it passes.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your greatest strength when facing a period of personal hardship?

options.text: My ability to maintain hope and integrity despite unfair treatment.
My resourcefulness and willingness to take a gamble to change my fate.
My capacity to find beauty and harmony in the simplest things.
My intellectual curiosity and ability to find solace in learning.
My growing awareness and ability to learn from my past mistakes.

baseline_questions.question_text: What motivates you most to step out of your comfort zone and into the unknown?

options.text: A sense of duty and loyalty to my family or those I care for.
The pursuit of knowledge and a desire to understand the world better.
The dream of a better life and the belief that I deserve more.
The thrill of discovery and the potential for a massive reward.
The desire to build a home and a sense of belonging wherever I go.

topics.display_name: Which Parks and Rec Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'Parks And Recreation' Character Are You?
synopsis.summary: Grab your waffles and head to JJ's Diner because it's time to find your Pawnee alter ego. Whether you're a high-achieving Leslie Knope or a woodworking Ron Swanson, your personality says a lot about your role in the Parks department. We'll analyze your work ethic, breakfast preferences, and feelings about Li'l Sebastian to find your match.

characters.name: Leslie Knope
characters.short_description: You are a tireless, optimistic public servant who believes in the power of community and the importance of a well-organized binder.
characters.profile_text: You are the ultimate overachiever, fueled by waffles, friendship, and an unwavering belief that government can make people's lives better. Your work ethic is legendary, often leading you to create massive binders for every possible scenario and to work through the night to ensure a project is perfect. You value your friends above all else, celebrating their smallest victories with elaborate, personalized gifts that show just how much you care. While your enthusiasm is your greatest strength, it can sometimes be overwhelming for those who do not share your high-octane energy. You have a tendency to steamroll others in your quest to do what you think is right, even if they have not asked for your help. Learning to step back and let others lead is a challenge for you, but your heart is always in the right place. Your optimism is a beacon of light, and your dedication to your community is truly inspiring.

characters.name: Ron Swanson
characters.short_description: You are a staunch individualist who values privacy, woodworking, and a diet consisting primarily of red meat and scotch.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of few words and even less patience for bureaucracy, preferring the quiet solitude of a woodshop to the chaos of an office. You believe in self-reliance and the Swanson Pyramid of Greatness, holding yourself to a strict code of honor that emphasizes hard work and personal responsibility. Your love for breakfast food and high-quality craftsmanship is only matched by your disdain for government waste and skim milk. Beneath your gruff, stoic exterior lies a surprisingly loyal friend who will go to great lengths to protect those you care about, though you would never admit it out loud. You prefer to keep your personal life a complete mystery, often going to extreme measures to ensure your privacy remains intact. Your blunt honesty can be jarring to some, but those who know you appreciate your consistency and your refusal to compromise your values for the sake of politeness.

characters.name: April Ludgate
characters.short_description: You are a dry-witted, cynical individual who hides a surprisingly soft heart behind a facade of boredom and dark humor.
characters.profile_text: You navigate the world with a healthy dose of irony and a general distaste for most people, preferring the company of animals or the chaos of a well-timed prank. Your deadpan delivery and love for the macabre often leave others wondering if you are joking or genuinely plotting their demise. Despite your best efforts to appear indifferent, you are fiercely protective of the few people you actually like, often using your sharp wit to defend them from anyone you deem unworthy. You have a unique talent for finding the absurdity in everyday situations and a creative streak that often manifests in strange, artistic ways. While you might act like you hate your job, your intelligence and ability to manipulate social situations make you surprisingly effective when you actually put in the effort. Your journey involves learning that it is okay to care about things and that showing vulnerability is not a sign of weakness, even if you still prefer to do it while wearing a hoodie.

characters.name: Andy Dwyer
characters.short_description: You are a lovable, high-energy goofball with a heart of gold and a penchant for getting into ridiculous situations.
characters.profile_text: You approach life with the unbridled enthusiasm of a golden retriever, finding joy in the simplest things and always looking for the next big adventure. Whether you are performing with your band, Mouse Rat, or pretending to be an elite FBI agent named Burt Macklin, your imagination knows no bounds. You are incredibly loyal and kind-hearted, often putting the needs of your friends and loved ones above your own without a second thought. Your lack of traditional book smarts is more than made up for by your emotional intelligence and your ability to make anyone laugh, even in the most stressful circumstances. However, your impulsivity and tendency to act before thinking can lead to some messy situations, both literally and figuratively. You might struggle with adult responsibilities like paying bills or maintaining a clean house, but your genuine spirit and infectious positivity make you impossible to stay mad at for long.

characters.name: Tom Haverford
characters.short_description: You are an aspiring mogul and trendsetter who is always on the lookout for the next big business opportunity or luxury experience.
characters.profile_text: You are the definition of treat yo self, with a deep appreciation for fine fabrics, high-end electronics, and anything that makes you look like a high-rolling entrepreneur. Your mind is constantly buzzing with new business ideas, from Entertainment 720 to Rent-a-Swag, and you are not afraid to take big risks to achieve your dreams of fame and fortune. You value style and presentation above almost everything else, believing that the right suit or a catchy nickname can open doors that hard work alone cannot. While your ambition is impressive, you can sometimes get caught up in the superficial aspects of success, losing sight of the practical steps needed to make your visions a reality. You have a tendency to be a bit self-centered, but your charm and infectious energy usually win people over in the end. Deep down, you crave validation and success, and you are willing to hustle harder than anyone else to make sure the world knows your name.

characters.name: Donna Meagle
characters.short_description: You are a confident, sophisticated powerhouse who knows exactly what she wants and is not afraid to go after it.
characters.profile_text: You move through life with an air of effortless cool, commanding respect through your competence and your impeccable taste in luxury cars and international travel. You are a master of social dynamics, always knowing the latest gossip and how to use it to your advantage, yet you remain fiercely private about your own personal affairs. Your confidence is your greatest asset, allowing you to navigate any situation with poise and a sharp wit that can cut through any nonsense. You value quality over quantity in all things, whether it is the people you spend time with or the fine leather goods you purchase during your annual Treat Yo Self celebrations. While you can appear detached or even intimidating to those who do not know you, you are a loyal friend who offers grounded, practical advice when it is needed most. You do not suffer fools gladly and have little patience for incompetence, but your high standards apply to yourself just as much as they do to everyone else.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically approach a new project or task at work?

options.text: I create a meticulously organized binder with a 10-point plan for success.
I work in total solitude and finish as quickly as possible to avoid small talk.
I find a way to make the results look flashy and trendy with minimal effort.
I turn the task into a fun game or an imaginative role-playing adventure.
I express outward boredom while secretly being the most competent person in the room.
I delegate the busy work to others while maintaining total control of the situation.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your preferred role within a group of friends?

options.text: The enthusiastic leader who remembers every birthday and milestone.
The mysterious one whose home address and personal life are total secrets.
The aspiring mogul who is always looking for the next big business idea.
The lovable goofball who is always ready to start a band or a prank.
The cynical observer who communicates primarily through dry sarcasm.
The sophisticated powerhouse who offers grounded, practical advice.

baseline_questions.question_text: What kind of gift are you most likely to give a close friend?

options.text: A personalized, thoughtful scrapbook that took weeks to assemble.
A high-quality, handmade object made of solid wood or metal.
A luxury item that signals high status and entrepreneurial success.
Something fun and spontaneous, like a new musical instrument or a toy.
Something strange, dark, or uniquely weird that only they would appreciate.
A high-end designer accessory or a voucher for a luxury experience.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you feel about strict rules and government bureaucracy?

options.text: I embrace them; rules are the foundation of a fair and organized society.
I despise them; they are a waste of time for any self-reliant individual.
I look for a clever loophole that I can turn into a branding opportunity.
I usually forget they exist until someone points them out to me.
I find them absurd and enjoy mocking the people who take them seriously.
I navigate them with ease because I know exactly how the system works.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your idea of the perfect 'Treat Yo Self' day?

options.text: A massive breakfast at a local diner with my favorite people.
A quiet night with a glass of scotch and absolutely no talking.
Shopping for fine fragrances and the latest high-end electronics.
A wild party where I can be the center of attention and have fun.
Doing something macabre, like visiting a haunted house or an animal shelter.
A trip to a luxury spa followed by a drive in a high-end European car.

topics.display_name: Which World Wonder Matches Your Spirit?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic World Wonder Is Actually Your Soulmate?
synopsis.summary: Are you a timeless mystery or a bold feat of modern engineering? From the ancient sands of Giza to the lush heights of Machu Picchu, your personality aligns with a landmark that has stood the test of time. Take this quiz to discover which global masterpiece reflects your inner strength and spirit.

characters.name: Great Pyramid of Giza
characters.short_description: You are a timeless strategist whose wisdom and resilience command respect across generations.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a stoic and enduring nature, standing firm while the world shifts rapidly around you. Your personality is built on a foundation of logic and precision, making you the person others turn to when they need a steady hand or a long-term vision. You value legacy above all else, preferring to build things that last rather than chasing fleeting trends. Your strengths lie in your incredible patience and your ability to see the big picture of history, allowing you to remain calm during crises that would rattle others.

However, your unwavering commitment to tradition and structure can sometimes make you appear unyielding or emotionally distant. You might struggle with sudden changes or spontaneous outbursts, as you prefer the quiet dignity of established order. In relationships, you are a loyal protector who offers immense stability, though you may need to work on expressing your feelings more openly to ensure those around you feel truly seen. Your challenge is to remain relevant without losing the ancient soul that makes you so unique.

characters.name: Great Wall of China
characters.short_description: You are a protective and disciplined guardian who values security and collective strength above all.
characters.profile_text:
Your spirit is defined by an immense sense of duty and a desire to protect what you hold dear. You are naturally cautious and methodical, often setting clear boundaries to ensure the safety and integrity of your inner circle. You believe in the power of hard work and persistence, understanding that the greatest achievements are built brick by brick over a long period. You are the ultimate team player, always willing to sacrifice personal glory for the benefit of the community and the long-term survival of your goals.

While your defensive nature is a significant strength, it can occasionally lead to isolation if you are not careful. You might find it difficult to let new people in or to embrace vulnerability, viewing it as a potential weakness rather than a human necessity. Learning to lower your guard and trust others is your greatest personal challenge. When you do finally open up, you provide a level of support and reliability that is unmatched, making you the literal cornerstone of any group or family you belong to.

characters.name: Machu Picchu
characters.short_description: You are a spiritual explorer who finds harmony in the balance between nature and human ingenuity.
characters.profile_text:
You are a dreamer with a deep connection to the natural world and the mysteries of the universe. Your personality is a blend of quiet contemplation and adventurous spirit, often seeking out high-altitude perspectives that others might miss in the bustle of daily life. You value authenticity and find beauty in the integration of different ideas, much like stones fitted perfectly together without mortar. You are likely drawn to solitude and reflection, finding your energy in the great outdoors and the whispers of the past.

Your tendency to retreat into your own world can sometimes make you seem elusive or detached from reality to those who live in the lowlands of the mundane. You may struggle with the practical demands of modern life, preferring the ethereal and the philosophical to the strictly functional. Despite this, your unique perspective allows you to offer profound insights to those lucky enough to know you. You thrive in environments where you can be both creative and grounded, balancing your lofty ideals with a deep respect for the earth.

characters.name: Colosseum
characters.short_description: You are a charismatic and dramatic leader who thrives in the spotlight and values shared experiences.
characters.profile_text:
You have a larger-than-life personality that naturally draws people toward you like a magnet. You are energetic, bold, and unafraid of a little healthy competition, viewing life as a grand stage where every moment is an opportunity to perform and connect. You value social interaction and the thrill of the crowd, often acting as the life of the party or the catalyst for group activities. Your strengths are your infectious passion and your ability to inspire others through your sheer presence and confidence.

Because you are so focused on the spectacle and the external, you might occasionally overlook the subtler, quieter aspects of life. You may feel a constant pressure to be on, which can lead to burnout or a sense of emptiness when the audience fades away. Your challenge is to find value in the quiet moments of reflection between the grand events. In relationships, you are exciting and generous, though you must ensure you are listening as much as you are entertaining to build a truly deep and lasting connection.

characters.name: Taj Mahal
characters.short_description: You are a romantic and devoted soul whose life is guided by deep emotion and aesthetic beauty.
characters.profile_text:
Your spirit is one of profound devotion and artistic grace. You are moved by beauty in all its forms and often express your feelings through grand gestures or creative pursuits that leave a lasting impression. For you, love and loyalty are the primary motivators of existence, and you are willing to go to great lengths to honor the people and ideals you cherish. You possess a refined taste and a gentle demeanor that makes others feel cherished and understood in your presence, creating an atmosphere of peace.

However, your intense focus on perfection and emotional depth can sometimes lead to melancholy or an obsession with the past. You may find it hard to move on from loss or to accept the inevitable flaws in yourself and others. Your sensitivity is your greatest gift, but it also makes you vulnerable to the harshness of the world. By learning to balance your high idealism with a bit of daily pragmatism, you can create a life that is as enduring as it is beautiful, turning your grief into art.

characters.name: Christ the Redeemer
characters.short_description: You are a compassionate and welcoming presence who seeks to offer peace and acceptance to everyone.
characters.profile_text:
You radiate a sense of calm and openness that puts others at ease immediately. Your arms are figuratively always open, as you believe in the power of forgiveness, inclusivity, and spiritual connection. You are often the person who bridges gaps between conflicting groups, acting as a beacon of hope and a symbol of unity in a divided world. Your strengths lie in your radical empathy and your ability to see the inherent worth in every individual, regardless of their background or past mistakes.

Because you take on the weight of others' burdens so readily, you may find yourself feeling emotionally exhausted or overextended. You might struggle to say no or to set healthy boundaries, fearing that you will let someone down if you are not always available to help. It is important for you to remember that even a beacon needs to be refueled. When you take time for self-care and personal reflection, your ability to inspire and heal others becomes even more powerful, making you a true pillar of your community and a source of light.

topics.display_name: Which Norse God Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Norse God Actually Matches Your Vibe?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered if your short temper is actually a sign of divine thunder, or if your love for a good prank is truly mischief in disguise? From the halls of Valhalla to the depths of the Nine Realms, your personality aligns with one of the powerful deities of the Aesir or Vanir. Take this quiz to discover which legendary figure from Norse mythology rules your spirit. It's time to find out if you're destined for the throne of Asgard or a life of cunning adventure!

characters.name: Odin
characters.short_description: You are the All-Father, a seeker of wisdom and a master of the complex arts of leadership and sacrifice.
characters.profile_text: You possess an insatiable thirst for knowledge and a willingness to pay any price to understand the deeper mysteries of the world. Your mind is your greatest weapon, often preoccupied with long-term strategies and the weight of responsibility that comes with being a visionary. You are not afraid of the dark or the difficult, often finding clarity in solitude or through intense intellectual pursuits. Your strength lies in your profound insight and ability to lead others through sheer force of will and wisdom. However, your tendency toward secrecy and your obsession with the "big picture" can make you appear distant or even manipulative to those who do not share your perspective. You must be careful not to lose your humanity in the pursuit of absolute truth, as the burden of knowing everything can lead to a lonely existence.

characters.name: Thor
characters.short_description: You are the mighty protector, defined by your immense strength, unwavering loyalty, and straightforward approach to life's challenges.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of action who values honesty and courage above all else. When a problem arises, you do not overthink it; you meet it head-on with everything you have got. Your presence is grounding and protective, making you the person friends turn to when they need a champion or a reliable hand. You find joy in the physical world, whether through hard work, competition, or the simple pleasure of a shared meal. Your greatest asset is your integrity and your protective nature, which inspires trust in everyone around you. Yet, your impulsive nature and quick temper can sometimes lead you into conflicts that could have been avoided with a bit more patience. Learning to balance your raw power with a touch of diplomacy will ensure that your hammer is always used for the right reasons rather than just reacting to the moment.

characters.name: Loki
characters.short_description: You are the silver-tongued trickster, a master of adaptation who thrives on chaos and unconventional solutions.
characters.profile_text: You are a shapeshifter at heart, comfortable in the gray areas where others see only black and white. Your wit is your sharpest tool, allowing you to talk your way into and out of almost any situation. You have a unique ability to see the flaws in established systems and are not afraid to poke at them, often bringing about necessary change through unconventional or even disruptive means. Your creativity and quick thinking make you an invaluable ally when traditional methods fail. However, your love for mischief and your unpredictable nature can lead to a lack of trust from those closest to you. You may find yourself feeling like an outsider, struggling to balance your need for independence with the desire for genuine connection. Mastering your impulses will help you use your brilliance for more than just self-preservation.

characters.name: Freya
characters.short_description: You are the goddess of love and war, embodying a powerful blend of fierce independence, deep passion, and mystical intuition.
characters.profile_text: You move through the world with a magnetic grace, drawing others to your vibrant energy and appreciation for beauty. You are deeply in touch with your emotions and your desires, viewing them not as weaknesses but as the primary sources of your strength. Whether you are pursuing a creative passion or defending what you love, you do so with an intensity that is both inspiring and formidable. Your ability to empathize and your keen intuition allow you to navigate complex social landscapes with ease. You are a natural leader in matters of the heart and the spirit. However, your strong passions can sometimes lead to possessiveness or a tendency to be overwhelmed by your own intensity. Finding a balance between your desire for connection and your need for personal autonomy is the key to maintaining your inner harmony.

characters.name: Tyr
characters.short_description: You are the god of justice and war, characterized by your unwavering sense of duty, self-sacrifice, and moral integrity.
characters.profile_text: You are the embodiment of the principle that doing the right thing often requires a personal cost. You value order, law, and the sanctity of a promise above your own comfort. In any group, you are the moral compass, the one who ensures that rules are followed and that justice is served, even when it is difficult or unpopular. Your courage is not loud or boastful; it is a quiet, steady resolve. Your reliability and sense of honor make you a pillar of any community. People know they can count on you to be fair and steadfast. The danger you face is a tendency toward rigidity or a self-martyring attitude that can leave you feeling drained or resentful. Remember that while sacrifice is noble, it is also important to care for yourself so that you can continue to stand for what is right.

characters.name: Frigg
characters.short_description: You are the wise queen and seer, a nurturing force who uses foresight and diplomacy to maintain harmony and protect your domain.
characters.profile_text: You possess a quiet authority and a deep understanding of the threads that connect people. Your strength lies in your ability to see the potential outcomes of every action, allowing you to guide others with a gentle but firm hand. You are the keeper of secrets and the weaver of destinies, often working behind the scenes to ensure that peace is maintained and that those you care for are safe. Your patience and strategic mind make you an excellent mediator and a trusted advisor. You have a gift for making others feel heard and valued. However, your desire to protect everyone can sometimes manifest as a need for control or a tendency to worry excessively about the future. Learning to trust that others can handle their own battles will allow you to focus your wisdom where it is most needed.
